title: Add real food images for Nellore Chepala Pulusu, Prawns Biriyani, and Natu Kodi Kura

requirements.summary: Update CuisineSection to display generated images for Chepala Pulusu, Prawns Biriyani, and Natu Kodi Kura while maintaining South Indian theme styling and emoji fallback
acceptanceCriteria: The Chepala Pulusu cuisine card displays the generated chepala-pulusu image as its banner.
The Prawns Biriyani cuisine card displays the generated prawns-biriyani image as its banner.
The Natu Kodi Kura cuisine card displays the generated natu-kodi-kura image as its banner.
Cards for dishes without a generated image still fall back to the emoji icon display.
All cuisine cards retain the existing South Indian terracotta/gold/teal theme and card layout.

file_operations.description: Add a mapping object that associates the dish names 'Nellore Chepala Pulusu', 'Prawns Biriyani', and 'Natu Kodi Kura' to their corresponding generated image filenames: frontend/public/assets/generated/chepala-pulusu.dim_800x500.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/prawns-biriyani.dim_800x500.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/natu-kodi-kura.dim_800x500.png. Update the card banner rendering logic to check if a dish name exists in this mapping and display the mapped image; otherwise fall back to the emoji icon display. Preserve all existing South Indian theme styling including terracotta/gold/teal palette, Playfair Display and Lato fonts, spice-level badge overlay, and card layout structure.
